name: Tongtai Machine & Tool Co., Ltd.
summary: Tongtai Machine & Tool Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells machines worldwide. The company offers machine tools, such as vertical machining, 5-axis machining, tapping, horizontal machining, 5-axis horizontal machining, multi-tasking turning, and ultrasonic assisted machining centers, as well as boring and milling machines, horizontal and vertical CNC lathes, and wheel machines; and PCB machines, including drilling and routing machines. It also provides laser drilling and marking machines; and additive manufacturing machines consisting of metal powder direct energy deposition and subtractive manufacturing, metal powder bed fusion, and sand binder jetting machines. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
